payload.title: Hi! This is Claude · shell-2. The odd_manager project is a GTL 3 / ABG 3 application — a graph-first, composition-first workflow system. The codebase includes a React+Vite frontend (the OddBoard dashboard), a Node.js backend with services for OddTerm (terminal pooling), OddChat (this room system), OddBoard (graph visualization), and a Python runtime layer. The workspace is organized around GTL (Graph Traversal Language) declarations and an ABG (event-sourced, provenance-carrying) interpreter. The current topic (test002) sits on the "Bootstrap Asset Graph" station, edge "code_surface". Happy to dig into any specific area.
payload.content: Hi! This is Claude · shell-2. The odd_manager project is a GTL 3 / ABG 3 application — a graph-first, composition-first workflow system. The codebase includes a React+Vite frontend (the OddBoard dashboard), a Node.js backend with services for OddTerm (terminal pooling), OddChat (this room system), OddBoard (graph visualization), and a Python runtime layer. The workspace is organized around GTL (Graph Traversal Language) declarations and an ABG (event-sourced, provenance-carrying) interpreter. The current topic (test002) sits on the "Bootstrap Asset Graph" station, edge "code_surface". Happy to dig into any specific area.

payload.title: `odd_manager` is the operator-facing control-plane product for OODD systems. Its job is to make GTL declarations, ABG runtime truth, graph sets, typed assets, bindings, workorders, jobs, runs, evidence, provenance, and closure visible, governable, auditable, and explainable without inventing a second runtime. It stays separate from `abiogenesis`, which remains the canonical GTL/ABG language and runtime authority, and from `odd_method`, which remains the emerging builder/domain line. In this repo the current posture is design-first: the domain model lives under `specification/`, the shared operator visual system lives under `build_tenants/common/design/`, and the active UI carrier target is `build_tenants/react_vite/`.
payload.content: `odd_manager` is the operator-facing control-plane product for OODD systems. Its job is to make GTL declarations, ABG runtime truth, graph sets, typed assets, bindings, workorders, jobs, runs, evidence, provenance, and closure visible, governable, auditable, and explainable without inventing a second runtime. It stays separate from `abiogenesis`, which remains the canonical GTL/ABG language and runtime authority, and from `odd_method`, which remains the emerging builder/domain line. In this repo the current posture is design-first: the domain model lives under `specification/`, the shared operator visual system lives under `build_tenants/common/design/`, and the active UI carrier target is `build_tenants/react_vite/`.

payload.title: @claude - give me a status of the project
payload.content: @claude - give me a status of the project

payload.title: Project status for odd_manager (as of 2026-04-10):
payload.content:
Project status for odd_manager (as of 2026-04-10):

**Branch**: main — 3 commits total (Initial import → GTL sync checkpoint → OddTerm color/session fix).

**Uncommitted work** — 30 modified files, 4 new files, ~3,000 lines net addition. Major areas:

1. **Genesis/GTL runtime** — binding.py (+441), materialization.py (+143), graph.py (+99), interpret.py, frames.py, selection.py all updated. LLM builder guide expanded.
2. **React+Vite frontend** — RuntimePanel.tsx (+469), OddTermPanel.tsx (+331), OddTermWorkspaceWidget.tsx (+133), OddBoardWidget.tsx refactored, collaboration.ts and api.ts expanded, new types added.
3. **Server layer** — index.mjs (+596, large rewrite), oddboard-service.mjs, oddterm-pool-service.mjs, odd-console.mjs, odd-plugin-host.mjs all updated. New services: irc-gateway-service.mjs, oddchat-participant-service.mjs, useSessionServiceState.ts.
4. **Specification** — Requirements 07 (live coordination) and 08 (session/workspace adapters) updated. Dashboard design doc expanded.
5. **Runtime** — odd_manager_world.py updated, new odd_manager_irc_mcp.mjs added.

**Posture**: Active development, design-first. Large uncommitted delta suggests an in-progress feature push across the full stack (GTL runtime, server services, and UI). Nothing committed yet for the new IRC/OddChat participant services.
